name: Zucchini Pancakes with Golden Tomato Concasse
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Golden Tomatoes, cored, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Tomato Concasse: Drain chopped tomatoes in a colander for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Zucchini Pancakes: Grate zucchini and onion into a large bowl and sprinkle with salt. Let stand for 10 minutes. Squeeze excess water from grated vegetables.
3. Combine zucchini, onion, and garlic in the same bowl. In a small bowl, combine flour, Parmesan cheese, mint, nutmeg, and pepper. Mix well and toss with zucchini.
4. Add eggs to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
5. Heat olive or canola oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat until very hot. Form pancakes by pouring 1/4 cup of batter into the skillet for each pancake, spreading with the back of a spoon to make 3-inch circles.
6. Cook pancakes until brown on both sides, turning once. Drain on paper towels. Repeat with remaining batter.
7. Spoon tomato concasse over the cooked pancakes.
